goal: Close all outstanding v3 research branches, run a weak-window repair specialist program on the immutable base, and produce a final v4 verdict before any medium-friction work is unlocked.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify the baseline snapshot.
Every research branch must reach a terminal decision (promoted or rejected); no half-open branches allowed.
Previously rejected branches (H1_post_funding_long, H2_expiry_lead_lag, A1_high_iv_long_v1, A1b_high_iv_momentum, A4_wed_afternoon) must not be revived.
Medium-friction wave (B1, B2) is locked unless all five unlock conditions are simultaneously satisfied.
Maximum 2 weak pockets may be selected for specialist repair in a single research cycle.

slices.title: Полный closure-audit по прошлым планам
slices.hypothesis: Compile a unified register of every unfinished item from previous plans and establish the v4 research project with immutable reference.
slices.objective: Compile a unified register of every unfinished item from previous plans and establish the v4 research project with immutable reference.
success_criteria: A single open-items register exists and the immutable reference is recorded in the project.
evidence_requirements: A single open-items register exists and the immutable reference is recorded in the project.

slices.title: Формально закрыть все незавершенные документы и memory-nodes прошлых планов
slices.hypothesis: Eliminate all organisational debt — close hanging branches, create terminal nodes, and freeze past-plan memory.
slices.objective: Eliminate all organisational debt — close hanging branches, create terminal nodes, and freeze past-plan memory.
success_criteria: No research branch in memory lacks a terminal status (promoted or rejected).
evidence_requirements: No research branch in memory lacks a terminal status (promoted or rejected).

slices.title: Полностью закрыть ветку A2_iv_acceleration
slices.hypothesis: Drive the main unfinished v3 branch A2 to a definitive terminal decision through feature contract, materialization, plausibility check, strict prototyping, and full acceptance chain.
slices.objective: Drive the main unfinished v3 branch A2 to a definitive terminal decision through feature contract, materialization, plausibility check, strict prototyping, and full acceptance chain.
success_criteria: A2_iv_acceleration has a terminal decision: promoted or rejected with documented reason.
evidence_requirements: A2_iv_acceleration has a terminal decision: promoted or rejected with documented reason.
